decisions.decision: MAC address is the primary correlation key across all sources
Source priority for hostname/source selection: DHCP > Proxmox > Scan
Human-in-the-loop review is mandatory — pending → approved/rejected → pushed
Lazy NetBox connection — pynetbox client connects on first use, not at __init__
Secrets via NETBOX_AUTO_<SECTION>__<FIELD> environment variables, not YAML
IPv6 is opt-in via discovery.include_ipv6 (default false)
Local SQLite staging DB sits between every collector and the NetBox push
Strict MyPy with explicit per-module ignore_missing_imports overrides for stub-less libraries
Web UI binds to 127.0.0.1 by default — no auth, single-operator tool
Collectors implement a Protocol (not ABC) — duck-typed extension point
MAC normalization at the boundary — DiscoveredHost.__post_init__ lowercases and dash→colon
Switch port mapping preserves existing values when current run lacks data (existing.switch_port = switch_port or existing.switch_port)
